purpose: Registry of cluster validation profiles used after provider-backed provisioning and before LocalAI application deployment.
governanceRules: Cluster validation must run after provider-backed provisioning and kubeconfig refresh for official provider-backed cycles.
Application deployment and workload execution must not start when cluster validation fails.
Validation evidence must be written under the cycle-specific results tree for official provider-backed cycles.
Cluster-validation evidence is official only when produced by profiles resolved through an active experimental cycle or by runtime-generated profiles derived from the canonical validation template.
Minimal K3s readiness, metrics-server, local-path-provisioner, storage class, and Metrics API are sufficient unless later profiles require additional add-ons.
Validated provider-backed clusters must resolve an application deployment profile before benchmark execution.
Application deployment evidence must be retained under the cycle-specific results tree before benchmark artifacts are produced.
Runtime campaign variants must be generated from cluster validation templates rather than from concrete baseline profiles.

runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.rationale: Campaign-variant cluster validation profiles are generated from the template to validate each provider-backed cluster against the variant-specific infrastructure profile and kubeconfig.
runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.networkAwareSchedulerToolchainScope: C9 uses runtime-generated provider-backed profiles with proxmox-k3s v1.0.3 add-on support.
